name: Sauteed Snow Peas B1
recipeIngredient: 2 Green onions; split and cut into 2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. String snow peas.
2. Blanch in salted, boiling water for 20 seconds.
3. Drain the peas thoroughly.
4. Preheat a wok to high heat.
5. Add corn oil to the hot wok and swirl to coat.
6. Add green onions and stir-fry until they begin to soften.
7. Pour in white wine and chicken broth, then add snow peas and salt.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil.
9. Mix cornstarch with water in a small bowl.
10. Stir the cornstarch slurry into the boiling mixture until it thickens.
11. Add sesame oil and serve immediately.
